method_note: Blinded fresh-patch simulation: every Gray Fox Cowl.esm record read with plugin="Gray Fox Cowl.esm" (own version), never the live winner and never the existing Authoria patch. Requiem comparables (REQ_Alch_* MGEF standards via effect_chain, REQ_Poison_* / REQ_Ingredient_* shells) read as live winners = the authority. Core doctrine confirmed live: no Requiem plugin or Reqtificator touches ALCH/INGR/COBJ here, so these overrides are FINAL â€” field-correctness is entirely on this pass.

records.comparable: Requiem - Alchemy Redone.esp per-MGEF standards via effect_chain (RestoreStamina/DrainHealth/DamageMagicka/RestoreHealth); rarity-value peer REQ_Ingredient_HorkerFat/WolfHeart (Value==IngredientValue==25 band)

field_checklist.flags_NoAutoCalc: was Flags=0 (auto-calc ON) -> NoAutoCalculation added (universal in Requiem INGR corpus)
field_checklist.effects_4_REQ_Alch: PASS - already 4 effects, all vanilla MGEFs Requiem overrides in place to REQ_Alch_* (RestoreStamina 03EB16, DrainHealth 073F26, DamageMagicka 03A2B6, RestoreHealth 03EB15); links kept, no rebuild, no route to requiem-magic-patching
field_checklist.per_MGEF_durations: standardized to Requiem: RestoreStamina/RestoreHealth dur=20, DrainHealth dur=60, DamageMagicka dur=0 (copied from AR carriers). Mod authored dur=0/10/0/0 (vanilla scale) -> corrected
field_checklist.magnitudes_tier_knob: common-tier ladder: RestoreStamina 1, DrainHealth 8, DamageMagicka 16, RestoreHealth 1. Mod authored 5/2/3/5 (vanilla scale) -> corrected
field_checklist.value_eq_ingredientvalue: decoupled 6/12 -> unified to 12/12 (curated band, cf HorkerFat 25)

records.rationale: Common beast-part ingredient. Effect FormIDs already resolve to REQ_Alch_* behaviour, so shell-rebalance only: enable NoAutoCalc, unify Value/IngredientValue, standardize every effect's duration per-MGEF and drop magnitudes to Requiem's common-tier ladder, add the missing VendorItemIngredient keyword.

records.comparable: AR per-MGEF standards (RestoreStamina/FortifyArmorRating/FortifySmithing/WeaknessPoison); rarity peer REQ_Ingredient_WolfHeart (25/25) / SabrecatHeart (35/35)

field_checklist.effects_4_REQ_Alch: PASS - 4 effects, all Requiem-overridden MGEFs (RestoreStamina, FortifyArmorRating 03EB1E, FortifySmithing 03EB1D, WeaknessPoison 090042)
field_checklist.per_MGEF_durations: RestoreStamina dur=20, FortifyArmorRating dur=60, FortifySmithing dur=60, WeaknessPoison dur=30 (Requiem standards). Mod authored 0/60/30/30 -> FortifySmithing dur corrected 30->60
field_checklist.magnitudes_tier_knob: common tier: RestoreStamina 1, FortifyArmorRating 24, FortifySmithing 1, WeaknessPoison 6. Mod authored 5/2/4/2 -> corrected (FortifyArmorRating especially: mod 2 vs Requiem common 24)

records.rationale: Same common-tier shell-rebalance pattern. FortifyArmorRating is the sharpest correction: mod's mag 2 is vanilla-scale vs Requiem's fixed common mag 24. Links kept.

records.flag_question: Weight normalized 25 -> 1.0 (a 25-weight ingredient is game-breaking vs Requiem's heaviest ingredient ~5); confirm the mineral-chunk archetype weight. Magnitudes set to potent tier given IngredientValue 106 (dust/rare band, cf BlueDust 100).
records.comparable: AR per-MGEF standards (RestoreMagicka/DamageStaminaRegen/FortifySmithing/FortifyBlock); rarity peer REQ_Ingredient_BlueDust (100/100), MammothHeart weight ceiling 5

field_checklist.effects_4_REQ_Alch: PASS - 4 effects, all Requiem-overridden MGEFs (RestoreMagicka 03EB17, DamageStaminaRegen 073F2C, FortifySmithing 03EB1D, FortifyBlock 03EB1C)
field_checklist.per_MGEF_durations: RestoreMagicka dur=20, DamageStaminaRegen dur=60, FortifySmithing dur=60, FortifyBlock dur=60. Mod authored 0/15/15/15 -> all corrected to Requiem standards
field_checklist.magnitudes_tier_knob: potent tier (value 106): RestoreMagicka 2, DamageStaminaRegen 48, FortifySmithing 1.5, FortifyBlock 4. Mod authored 15/100/9/9 (vanilla scale) -> corrected

records.rationale: Higher-value 'Goron Piece' mineral chunk -> potent-tier magnitudes. Its authored weight 25 and magnitudes (100 stamina-regen drain) are vanilla/mod scale far off Requiem; rebalanced. Effect links unchanged.

records.comparable: AR per-MGEF standards (WeaknessPoison/FortifyStamina/DamageMagicka/Invisibility); rarity peer band ~ChaurusEggs / mid value 59

field_checklist.effects_4_REQ_Alch: PASS - 4 effects, all Requiem-overridden MGEFs (WeaknessPoison 090042, FortifyStamina 03EAF9, DamageMagicka 03A2B6, Invisibility 03EB3D)
field_checklist.per_MGEF_durations: WeaknessPoison dur=30, FortifyStamina dur=300, DamageMagicka dur=0, Invisibility dur=4 (magnitude-0 duration-scaled effect - standard rung 4). Mod authored 30/60/0/4 -> FortifyStamina dur corrected 60->300; Invisibility already at standard dur=4
field_checklist.magnitudes_tier_knob: common tier: WeaknessPoison 6, FortifyStamina 8, DamageMagicka 16, Invisibility mag 0 (fixed-behaviour, duration is the axis). Mod authored 2/4/3/0 -> corrected

records.rationale: Invisibility is a fixed-behaviour, duration-scaled REQ MGEF (magnitude 0 across all Requiem carriers) - kept at mag 0, duration on the standard rung 4. Remaining three effects moved to Requiem common-tier magnitudes + standardized durations. This is the produced ingredient of FLOR Egg Sacs (01D946).

records.flag_question: Magnitude 130 -> 80 and Value 380 -> 40 assume a mass-harvestable poison that sits on Requiem's ladder (tier-2 REQ_Poison_DamageStamina2), NOT a unique/quest item. Verify obtainment: if it were a single fixed unique, a bespoke value could stand.
records.comparable: REQ_Poison_DamageStamina2 073F41:Skyrim.esm (winner AR) - Value 40, Weight 0.5, Flags NoAutoCalc+Poison, VendorItemPoison, DamageStamina mag 80 dur 0; ladder rung 1 = REQ_Poison_DamageStamina1 (mag 40 / Value 20)

field_checklist.class_assigned: poison (mod classified it 'Potion' but Flags=Poison + VendorItemPoison + single Damage-Stamina effect = poison; classification confirmed, not changed)
field_checklist.flags_NoAutoCalc: was Flags=Poison only (auto-calc ON, which inflated Value to 380 off MGEF BaseCost) -> NoAutoCalc,Poison
field_checklist.effects_correct: PASS - single effect REQ_Alch_DamageStamina 03A2C6 (Requiem overrides vanilla MGEF in place); link kept, no rebuild. Structure matches Requiem poisons (single-effect)
field_checklist.magnitude_on_ladder: 130 -> 80 (Requiem tier-2 cap REQ_Poison_DamageStamina2); dur=0 already correct
field_checklist.value_on_ladder: 380 (auto-calc-inflated) -> 40 (poison ladder tier-2; hand-set, never from BaseCost)

records.rationale: Classified as a Damage Stamina poison (confirmed, not reclassified). Fixes: enable NoAutoCalc (its absence let auto-calc inflate value to 380), cap magnitude to Requiem's tier-2 ladder (80), and set an on-ladder poison value (40). Effect link already resolves to REQ behaviour.

records.skip_reason: Flora harvest node (Egg Sacs), not a consumable balance record - a FLOR has no Value/Weight/effect payload for the consumable economy. Its produced ingredient, Duneripper Eggs 01D947, is patched in the INGR lane; the Ingredient link (01D947:Gray Fox Cowl.esm) is valid and unchanged. No Requiem consumable field to set here.
records.rationale: Alchemy-adjacent check per lane brief: FLOR is a harvestable placement/link record. It carries no balance payload the consumable skill owns; only its Ingredient link matters and that resolves to a real, patched INGR. Harvest gating (if any) is a world/placement concern, not consumable balance.

notes: Freshness probe PASS: houseCARL instance = ARR 2.0, profile 'Authoria - Requiem Reforged'; Iron Sword 012EB7 conflict_tree shows Requiem.esp in the override chain (winner Requiem for the Indifferent.esp). Live winner is the authority.

Blinding held: all 6 Gray Fox Cowl.esm balance targets (4 INGR + 1 ALCH + 1 FLOR) read with plugin="Gray Fox Cowl.esm" own version. The existing 'Authoria - Patch - Gray Cowl of Nocturnal Requiem.esp' (which wins 7 of the 10 COBJs) was never read for derivation.

Key structural finding: EVERY effect on all 4 INGR and the ALCH already points at a vanilla MGEF FormID that Requiem overrides IN PLACE (all resolve to REQ_Alch_* via resolve_names). This is the 'keep the links, rebalance the shell' case - zero effect rebuilds, and NOTHING routes to requiem-magic-patching. No genuinely new MGEF exists in this lane.

The dominant fresh-patch correction across the INGR set is that the mod authored vanilla-scale magnitudes and durations (e.g. RestoreStamina mag 5 vs Requiem 1; FortifyArmorRating mag 2 vs Requiem 24; FortifySmithing dur 15/30 vs Requiem 60) and shipped every ingredient with auto-calc ON (Flags=0). Requiem standardizes duration per-MGEF and uses a discrete magnitude ladder; both derived live via effect_chain over Requiem - Alchemy Redone.esp carriers.
Value==IngredientValue is a hard Requiem convention (verified on 9 REQ_Ingredient_* peers, all equal except the deliberate Cleese joke record); all 4 INGR shipped decoupled and were unified.
Two vendor keywords were MISSING: Eye of Ancestral Cheetah and Ancestral Cheetah Tooth had no Keywords at all - VendorItemIngredient 08CDEB added. Goron Piece and Duneripper Eggs already carried it.
Goron Piece weight 25 is the standout outlier (Requiem's heaviest ingredient ~5) - normalized to 1.0 and flagged.

Duneripper Blood: mod-classified 'Potion' but it is a poison (Poison flag + VendorItemPoison + single Damage-Stamina effect) - classification confirmed, not reclassified. Its Value 380 was auto-calc inflation (NoAutoCalc absent); corrected to Requiem's tier-2 poison ladder (Value 40, mag 80). Flagged for obtainment check.

COBJ lane: all 10 produce weapons/armor (forge keyword 088108 x8, tanning rack 0ADB78 x2) - ZERO use the cookpot (CraftingCookpot 0A5CB3). No consumable recipe exists, so no COBJ is patched here; all routed to weapons/armor lanes. This matches the FaB doctrine that Requiem defines zero cooking recipes.

Placement intent (for requiem-leveled-list-patching, not edited here): the 4 ingredients join Requiem's alchemy-ingredient loot/harvest pools; the poison is a crafted/loot poison. Per doctrine, ingredients/poisons may enter alchemist vendor lanes (unlike food, of which there is none in this lane).

No REQ_NULL_* reference appears in any patched field. All effect MGEFs are Skyrim.esm vanilla FormIDs overridden by Requiem; keyword FormIDs are Skyrim.esm masters - master list for the override would be Skyrim.esm + Gray Fox Cowl.esm + Requiem.esp (defining the REQ_Alch_* overrides).
